meta.description: Data structure references for a Detailed Design — one instance per design.

tables.description: UUIDs of Database Table items involved.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_1059dd4c_ec4e_4ea1_8634_dd7b3276730e" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "tables" UUID[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "erd" TEXT,
    "notes" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_1059dd4c_ec4e_4ea1_8634_dd7b3276730e" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_1059dd4cec4e4ea1_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
